title: Menstrual-hygiene continuity kit
summary: Store preferred products, clean underwear, opaque disposal bags, hand-cleaning supplies, pain-relief information, and a private washing plan.
content: Store preferred products, clean underwear, opaque disposal bags, hand-cleaning supplies, pain-relief information, and a private washing plan. Increase privacy, water, and disposal access rather than forcing one product on everyone. Seek medical help for very heavy bleeding, fainting, severe pain, pregnancy concern, fever, or sudden major change.
materials: Notebook or printed card. Context: “Menstrual-hygiene continuity kit”.
Relevant labels, contacts, and official alerts — for «Menstrual-hygiene continuity kit»
steps: Store preferred products, clean underwear, opaque disposal bags, hand-cleaning supplies, pain-relief information, and a private washing plan.

short_term: For Menstrual-hygiene continuity kit, stabilize the immediate risk, communicate the decision, and schedule the next check before attention moves elsewhere.
long_term: After Menstrual-hygiene continuity kit, update supplies, contact lists, maps, training, and the written plan from what actually happened.
if_method_fails: Stop Menstrual-hygiene continuity kit, isolate the unsafe result, communicate the failure, and use the safest official or professionally supported fallback available.
environment_notes: Adapt Menstrual-hygiene continuity kit to Greek heat, wildfire smoke, earthquakes, islands, mountain roads, apartment stairs, power cuts, water interruptions, mobility limits, and official alerts.
